summary: Tested Today→Log cross-tab sync after minWidth:0 fix. Login worked. Today tab loaded exercises with correct set rows. LOG button visible/clickable. POST /api/log fires. Cross-tab sync confirmed working - sets logged on Today tab appear as teal checkmarks on Log tab.
critical_code_review_comments: minWidth:0 fix confirmed in StyleSheet for both input and repsInput styles - LOG button no longer overflows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Today tab loads exercises with set rows (weight input × reps input + LOG button) properly laid out. Block Pull Primary shows 5/5 logged with teal checkmarks. Ab Wheel (Injury Prevention) had 1/3 logged from test run. Cross-tab sync confirmed: logging a set on Today fires POST /api/log and Log tab reflects the same state. Counter updates from 11/14 → 12/14 after logging. Expanded state on Today persists after switching to Log tab and back.

verified_features.log_button_visible_today: PASS - LOG button visible with proper width (56-57px) and height (24px), not overflowing off-screen
verified_features.post_api_log_fires: PASS - POST https://the-program-app.preview.emergentagent.com/api/log fired when LOG button clicked
verified_features.cross_tab_sync_today_to_log: PASS - Ab Wheel set 1 logged on Today (teal checkmark) appears as 1/3 logged on Log tab
verified_features.set_counter_updates: PASS - Counter updated from 11/14 → 12/14 after logging
verified_features.expanded_state_preserved: PASS - Today tab exercise cards remain expanded after switching tabs
verified_features.set_rows_inputs_visible: PASS - Weight and reps TextInputs render properly with minWidth:0 fix applied
